— Not enough parking 
— Some of the buildings are taller than other buildings

posts.text:
The most effective and accomplished GOP Speaker since Cannon was also a child molester. 

¯\_(ツ)_/¯


2001 Live (@25YearsAgoLive)

Speaker of the House Dennis Hastert meets with Boy Scouts at the U.S. Capitol. 

He addresses them about the benefits of being a Scout; ethics; and civic service.

In fact, both proved very costly!

posts.text:
If per person spending on the elderly goes up and the elderly share of the population also goes up, everything else gets squeezed and everyone is mad.

But it’s what the voters say they want.

posts.text:
From 50,000 feet I think it's easy to post on the internet "we need to return to real state capacity like in the New Deal instead of this endless reliance on contracting and outsourcing." 

But contracting is a very convenient workaround to public sector pay compression, unions, job tenure, etc
posts.quote:
From 50,000 feet I think it's easy to post on the internet "we need to return to real state capacity like in the New Deal instead of this endless reliance on contracting and outsourcing." 

But contracting is a very convenient workaround to public sector pay compression, unions, job tenure, etc

posts.text: Very good points here, though I question whether progressives are prepared to really do what it would take to reduce dependence on these kind of contractors.
posts.quote: Very good points here, though I question whether progressives are prepared to really do what it would take to reduce dependence on these kind of contractors.

congress-legislation.quote:
The most effective and accomplished GOP Speaker since Cannon was also a child molester. 

¯\_(ツ)_/¯


2001 Live (@25YearsAgoLive)

Speaker of the House Dennis Hastert meets with Boy Scouts at the U.S. Capitol. 

He addresses them about the benefits of being a Scout; ethics; and civic service.

From 50,000 feet I think it's easy to post on the internet "we need to return to real state capacity like in the New Deal instead of this endless reliance on contracting and outsourcing." 

But contracting is a very convenient workaround to public sector pay compression, unions, job tenure, etc
Very good points here, though I question whether progressives are prepared to really do what it would take to reduce dependence on these kind of contractors.
